MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LIY KATH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Anne-Leith Matlock of the Matlock Law Group (925.944.7131) for plaintiff and responding party; Martin Zurada (637.8483) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: sustained as to all causes of action. Plaintiff has leave to amend by January 20, 2012. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
